# Talon & Tide

> The world's first platform for ethically vetted wildlife experiences. Every safari, zoo encounter, and conservation expedition is personally evaluated by wildlife professionals in animal care, conservation, research, and veterinary fields.

Talon & Tide is a curated aggregator of ethical wildlife experiences. We do not take bookings — travelers connect directly with vetted operators. Founded by a former zookeeper with over a decade of hands-on experience in AZA-accredited zoos and a certificate in Hospitality and Tourism Management.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Ethically vetted wildlife experiences, hosted visits, and conservation travel.
- [Our Story](/#/about): The founder, mission, and expert network behind Talon & Tide.
- [Our Standards](/#/our-standards): How experiences are vetted — discovery process, hosted visits, and welfare criteria.
- [For Operators](/#/for-operators): Partnership types, benefits, and how to get listed.
- [Journal](/#/blog): Articles on ethical wildlife tourism, conservation, and travel.
- [Contact](/#/contact): Reach the team or submit a listing.

## Optional

- [Talon & Tide App](https://app.talonandtide.com): The PWA where travelers browse and connect with vetted operators.
